Our Product Lines

The Right Case for Every Collection

From solid hardwood cases to lightweight aluminum, riker-type chipboards to clear lucite stands — we have a display solution for every collector.

Most Popular

Wooden Display Cases

Handcrafted from solid cherry, walnut, and oak with brass hardware and velveteen inlay. Dozens of sizes available.

View Collection →
Lightweight & Portable

Aluminum Display Cases

Anodized aluminum with tempered glass, keyed locks, and built-in support arms. Perfect for shows and travel.

View Collection →
Collector Favorite

Riker-Type Chipboards

Glass-topped chipboard cases with polyester fill and interchangeable inserts. A staple for coins, arrowheads, and militaria.

View Collection →
Versatile Accents

Lucite Displays & Accessories

Clear acrylic easels, risers, glass domes, and specialty stands for showcasing individual pieces in any setting.

View Collection →
Why Choose Us

Over 50 Years of American Craftsmanship

What started as a small family operation in the early 1970s has grown into a three-division enterprise trusted by collectors, dealers, and enthusiasts across the country.

  • All products made in the USA using the finest quality materials
  • Custom non-stock sizes available made-to-order
  • Solid brass hinges, tempered glass, and quality hardware throughout
  • Every order individually boxed for safe, protective shipment
  • Direct, personal service — no automated systems
  • Three specialized divisions covering every collector need
Learn More About Us
